narrative: Antipodean currencies retreat as risk-off sentiment firms following Fed Chair Warsh’s hawkish hold — AUD/USD at 0.6962 and NZD/USD at 0.5697 lead G10 laggards; gold lower -1.61% near $4,135 as DXY +0.12% bids on resilient US data. USD/JPY holds at 161.39, supported by a +264bp OIS carry advantage despite moderate put skew in 25d risk reversals; equities -0.37%; VIX 19.8. Watch Eurozone PMI and US inflation data for the next directional catalyst.
